activated_rules.rule_name: Letter of Credit (LC) exception not active
General goods description with invoice reference

consignor.motivation: Consignor 'SKF Eurotrade AB' from Sweden in the certificate is explicitly present as invoice issuer 'SKF Eurotrade AB' from Sweden. Allowed normalization of legal form and diacritics applied. No conflicting party found in invoice. Rule 4.1.0 confirms consignor found anywhere in invoice documents including header and address. Land matches exactly after normalization per 4.1.4.

consignee.certificate_value: Proxima LLC, City Point, 2nd floor, AZ1078 Baku, Azerbaijan
consignee.invoice_value: Proxima LLC, City Point, 2nd floor, AZ1078 Baku, Azerbaijan
consignee.motivation: Consignee 'Proxima LLC' from Azerbaijan in certificate matches the 'Bill to' and 'Sold to' consignee fields in invoice. Land matches after normalization according to 4.2.3. Invoice has explicit consignee fields matching certificate, no conflicting party identified. Normalizations of legal form and formatting applied.

goods_description.certificate_value: Bearings and components, chains, lubricators, measuring equipment
goods_description.invoice_value: Multiple product lines with bearings and related components, detailed in invoice under matching HS-codes and product descriptions
goods_description.motivation: Certificate uses a general goods description referring explicitly via invoice number '8500026528' dated '18.12.2025'. Invoice with exact invoice number and date contains detailed product lines matching this. Per 4.3.5, this suffices to verify goods description without exact text match. Article numbers listed in certificate are present in invoice supporting match.

quantity.invoice_value: Invoice lists 16 packages, total gross weight 2.087,860 KG, total net weight 1.858,748 KG matching certificate values exactly after normalization
quantity.motivation: Quantity from certificate 16 CASES with gross weight 2,087.860 KGS and net weight 1,858.748 KGS matches invoice totals exactly. Invoice details 16 packages matching number, weight values match after allowed normalization of decimal separator and thousand separator (commas/points). Certificate quantity aligns with invoice total packages (16). No contradictions found.

origin.invoice_value: Invoice lists matching origin countries for all relevant product lines matching certificate origin list
origin.motivation: Certificate origin countries list multiple countries including EU, USA, China, etc. Invoice explicitly states manufacturing country for each product line matching all countries named in certificate origin. EU origin normalization applies and is consistent with invoice data. No origin countries in invoice contradict certificate origin. Rule 4.5.4.1 and 4.5.4.2 support match status.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: Alla tillämpliga kontrollpunkter mellan certifikat och faktura är uppfyllda enligt regelverket. Inga avvikelser eller osäkerheter har påträffats. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Dokumenten är sammanhängande och överensstämmer i avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland. En automatisk godkänning är möjlig.
